channel.title: pipes on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in pipes on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Pipes
item.description: library(tidyverse) Pipes are a way to order your code in a more readable format. Let’s say you have a small data table with 10 participant IDs, two columns with variable type A, and 2 columns with variable type B. You want to calculate the mean of the A variables and the mean of the B variables and return a table with 10 rows (1 for each participant) and 3 columns (id, A_mean and B_mean).
